events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for her chart-topping music, iconic film roles, and groundbreaking influence across entertainment.

angles.name: J.Lo's enduring hits
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', J.Lo has given us so many anthems. Which Jennifer Lopez track still makes you hit the dance floor?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday, continuing to define rock and roll with his iconic stage presence and songwriting.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! What's your all-time favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video, forever changing the landscape of music and television.

angles.name: Video killed the radio star?
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV launched with that iconic first video. Did music videos truly change how you listened to radio, or was it just another way to see your favourite artists?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, propelling the band to stardom and becoming one of the fastest-selling debut albums in UK history.

angles.name: Britpop's big bang
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's your standout track from that legendary album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, took place from August 15-18, 1969, becoming a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since Woodstock brought half a million people together for three days of peace and music. Which legendary performance would you have loved to witness?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on September 13, 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: A voice remembered
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we reflect on the powerful voice and enduring impact of Tupac Shakur. What's your go-to track from the rap legend?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we celebrate the unparalleled artistry of Jimi Hendrix. Which of his tracks showcases his genius best for you?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and one of the most famous album covers in music history.

angles.name: Crossing the road to greatness
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles dropped 'Abbey Road'. Is it their masterpiece, and what's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The iconic lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday, known for her distinctive voice and influential rock career.

angles.name: Pretenders' frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders track or Chrissie Hynde moment?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday, continuing to be a distinctive voice in British rock music.

angles.name: As You Were
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track he's fronted, from Oasis to solo?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single released (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 1, 1975, though the album came out in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine all the people
angles.copy: 49 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single dropped. Does this song still resonate as powerfully today?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players with its '1,000 songs in your pocket' promise.

angles.name: 1000 songs in your pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years since Apple changed how we listened to music forever. Did you have one, and what was the first album you loaded onto it?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007, and which Bond theme song is the ultimate classic?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A true visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the indelible legacy of John Lennon. What's his most impactful song for you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: And now for something completely different
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, showcasing the band's diverse musical directions.

angles.name: The Eclectic Masterpiece
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles gave us 'The White Album'. With its incredible range, what's your most unexpected favourite track from it?
